objective: Normalize one owner-local storage snapshot metric so strict content accounting remains portable on filesystems with reserved blocks.
executable_blocker: Exact-head private CI passes the repaired reality-loop prerequisite gate, then full pytest fails because reserved filesystem blocks make the raw used plus available-free values smaller than total on Linux.

required: retain the exact strict snapshot field set and total equals used plus free invariant
treat free bytes as available capacity and conservatively classify reserved blocks as used
derive normalized used bytes as total minus available free bytes on every platform
add one regression proving a raw reserved-block gap is normalized without changing free or total
retain content-addressed identity and all existing storage drift and tamper denials
forbidden: validator schema field content-identity workflow dependency config fixture or unrelated test change
platform conditional skip xfail tolerance fallback or assertion relaxation
runtime storage write dataset ledger scientific artifact or external mutation
network live authority deployment or public source copy

acceptance_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_system_state.py tests/test_capture_system_state_storage_snapshot.py
exact two-file diff plus no validator weakening platform skip private locator network or live-authority scan
rollback: Agent 0 discards the isolated two-file worker commit and deletes its branch/worktree. The prior Market candidate, original dirty checkout, runtime state, scientific artifacts, public Bridge and external systems remain unchanged.
